rationale: The plan is internally consistent and fit for deferred ratification as implemented. It realizes the registered meaning through read-only verification of the sole currently representable and populated supersession surface, while deterministically failing closed on malformed, unknown, or deferred node-backed candidates rather than silently accepting them. Its terminal disk-hash resolution, closed discovery model, source-based classification, boundary enforcement, executable read-only evidence, and explicit non-claims align with the stated repository trust model. The build-before-authorization sequence is represented truthfully, and the remaining authority attachment, comprehension, oracle, and enrollment requirements are correctly framed as activation conditions rather than facts already achieved. I find no unresolved contradiction or defect requiring amendment before authorization.
